# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

FROM golang:1.21-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

COPY . .

RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -o /app/service .

FROM alpine:3.19

RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /app/service .

EXPOSE 8080

ENTRYPOINT ["./service"]
